top.title: Meta and Google found liable in landmark social media addiction trial
top.summary: The verdict marks the end of a five-week trial on the addictive nature of social media platforms.

top.title: UN votes to recognise slavery as 'gravest crime against humanity'
top.summary: The landmark resolution calls for an apology and contributions to a reparations fund, without specifying an amount.

top.title: Democrats flip Florida state seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
top.summary: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.

top.title: Apple brings in age checks for UK iPhone users
top.summary: Customers who do not confirm how old they are or are underage will have web content filters turned on automatically.

top.title: Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers
top.summary: The government will interview the young people and their parents before and after they try the limits to assess their impact.
